title: “Several luminous objects” spotted by 3 pilots during their flights near Fortaleza-CE [1994]

text_preview:
Military internal communication report informing the sighting of an unidentified flying object by three different pilots during their flights near Fortaleza [CE].

“Occurrence Report N ° 16/94

From: Chief of C.O.D.A. To: 6th SC

Brasília, September 29th, 1994.

OCCURRENCE SUMMARY REGISTERED IN THE C.O.D.A. SERVICE BOOK 

Service of September 23, 1994

22:08Z-COpM II info PL-LLS reported having observed an unidentified flying object when flying (the PT-LLS) from SBNT [Natal-RN] / SBFZ [Fortaleza-CE]. The object was 45NM from the VOR FZ. It was like several luminous objects between FL 400/500 l
summary: Three commercial pilots near Fortaleza independently observed luminous objects between FL400-500 and a light trail on Sept 23, 1994.
